allow: PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\Program Files\\ParkControl\\uninstall.exe" -ArgumentList "/S" -PassThru -Wait; Write-Output "ExitCode: $\($proc.ExitCode\)"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Output "---After uninstall---"; if \(Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\ParkControl"\) { Write-Output "Folder still exists:"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\ParkControl" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName } else { Write-Output "C:\\Program Files\\ParkControl removed" })

PowerShell(Get-PSDrive -PSProvider FileSystem | Where-Object { $_.Used } | Select-Object Name, @{N='UsedGB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Used/1GB,2\)}}, @{N='FreeGB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1GB,2\)}}, @{N='TotalGB';E={[math]::Round\(\($_.Used+$_.Free\)/1GB,2\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Downloads' -Force -EA SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object Length -Descending | Select-Object -First 30 Name, @{N='SizeMB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)}}, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Desktop' -Force -EA SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object Length -Descending | Select-Object -First 25 Name, @{N='SizeMB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)}}, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Videos' -Force -EA SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object Length -Descending | Select-Object -First 20 Name, @{N='SizeMB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)}}, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Downloads' -File -Force -EA SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object Length -Descending | Select-Object -First 40 @{N='SizeMB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)}}, LastWriteTime, Name | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($rb = \(New-Object -ComObject Shell.Application\).Namespace\(10\); $items = $rb.Items\(\); $tot = 0; foreach\($i in $items\){ $tot += $i.Size }; "Recycle Bin: $\([math]::Round\($tot/1GB,2\)\) GB \($\($items.Count\) items\)")

PowerShell(Get-Item C:\\hiberfil.sys -Force -EA SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, @{N='SizeGB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1GB,2\)}}; Get-Item C:\\pagefile.sys -Force -EA SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, @{N='SizeGB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1GB,2\)}}; Get-Item C:\\swapfile.sys -Force -EA SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, @{N='SizeGB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1GB,2\)}})

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\Administrator' -Recurse -File -Force -EA SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Length -gt 500MB } | Sort-Object Length -Descending | Select-Object -First 30 @{N='SizeGB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1GB,2\)}}, LastWriteTime, FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Documents' -Force -EA SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, @{N='Size';E={if\($_.PSIsContainer\){'<DIR>'}else{[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\).ToString\(\)+' MB'}}}, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Videos' -Recurse -File -Force -EA SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum | Select-Object @{N='TotalGB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Sum/1GB,2\)}}, Count; Write-Output '---NVIDIA captures---'; if\(Test-Path 'C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Videos\\NVIDIA'\){ \(Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Videos\\NVIDIA' -Recurse -File -Force -EA SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum / 1GB | ForEach-Object { "NVIDIA folder: $\([math]::Round\($_,2\)\) GB" } })

PowerShell($v = \(Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Videos' -Recurse -File -Force -EA SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum; "Videos total: $\([math]::Round\($v/1GB,2\)\) GB"; if\(Test-Path 'C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Videos\\NVIDIA'\){ $n = \(Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Videos\\NVIDIA' -Recurse -File -Force -EA SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum; "NVIDIA captures: $\([math]::Round\($n/1GB,2\)\) GB" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Desktop\\random' -Force -EA SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object Length -Descending | Select-Object -First 15 Name, @{N='Size';E={if\($_.PSIsContainer\){'<DIR>'}else{[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\).ToString\(\)+' MB'}}}, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output '---games---'; Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Desktop\\games' -Force -EA SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object Length -Descending | Select-Object -First 15 Name, @{N='Size';E={if\($_.PSIsContainer\){'<DIR>'}else{[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\).ToString\(\)+' MB'}}}, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell("=== AVDs ==="; Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\Administrator\\.android\\avd' -Force -EA SilentlyContinue; "\(empty if no output\)"; "=== Valorant ==="; "Exists: $\(Test-Path 'C:\\Riot Games\\VALORANT'\)"; "=== Vanguard ==="; if\(Test-Path 'C:\\Program Files\\Riot Vanguard'\){ Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files\\Riot Vanguard' -Recurse -Force -EA SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName, Length } else { "Folder gone" }; "=== Spotify Data ==="; "Exists: $\(Test-Path 'C:\\Users\\Administrator\\AppData\\Local\\Spotify\\Data'\)"; "=== Gradle caches ==="; if\(Test-Path 'C:\\Users\\Administrator\\.gradle\\caches'\){ $r = \(Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\Administrator\\.gradle\\caches' -Recurse -Force -File -EA SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum; "Remaining: $\([math]::Round\($r/1MB,1\)\) MB" })

PowerShell(Get-PSDrive C | ForEach-Object { "Free: $\([math]::Round\($_.Free/1GB,2\)\) GB / $\([math]::Round\(\($_.Free+$_.Used\)/1GB,2\)\) GB total" }; Write-Output ''; Test-Path -LiteralPath 'C:\\Users\\Administrator\\Desktop\\random\\Microsoft Office 2019 Pro Plus Version 2108 Build 14326.20404 x64 En-US Pre-Activated [FileCR]')
